ground_truth.title: Transcendental Meditation Course Fees & Pricing Details | TM
ground_truth.main_content: The TM course fee varies depending on annual household income, ranging from $420 to $980. The fee may be paid in full or in installments. Partial scholarships may be available to those in need of financial assistance. Calculate your annual household income range by adding up the total income of everyone who lives in the same household. Select your annual household income to determine your price. The TM course fee includes: Personalized one-on-one instruction, 3 group sessions with your teacher and other course participants, Continued support from certified TM teachers, including personal tune-ups, The TM app (including a custom timer, access to daily group meditations and other TM events, a library of videos and knowledge, and much more), Access to TM centers around the world, A satisfaction guarantee. Payment options include paying in full via credit card (Visa, Mastercard, American Express, Discover, Diners Club, Elo, JCB, and Union Pay) or digital wallet (Apple Pay, Google Pay, PayPal, or Shop Pay). You can also pay in four monthly installments, with no hidden fees. The satisfaction guarantee requires attending all course sessions, completing course material, attending the follow-up session approximately 10 days after personal instruction, having a personal tune-up session, and practicing TM regularly for a minimum of 30 days. Refunds must be requested within 60 days of personal instruction. To qualify for the student fee, you must be in high school, a full-time undergraduate college student taking a minimum of 12 credits per semester, or a graduate student taking a minimum of 9 credits per semester. Scholarships and partial grants may be available for those in need of financial assistance, frontline workers, and veterans. Contact your local TM teacher to apply. The Transcendental Meditation technique is taught in the United States through Maharishi Foundation USA, a federally recognized 501(c)(3) non-profit educational organization. Course fees are used to cover teacher compensation and expenses that support the teaching of the TM technique.
